## Meridian Health Currency Elicitation Workspace

This subject workspace contains synthetic stakeholder and source freshness signals for a currency review.
Use BrainDS to identify stale or ambiguous records, defer stakeholder questions, and document next actions.

### Visible sources

| Source | Business meaning |
|---|---|
| `stakeholder_signals.csv` | Owners, review dates, and confidence notes from business teams |
| `source_refresh_log.csv` | Last refresh, cadence, and system-owner records |
| `open_questions.csv` | Known questions that require stakeholder confirmation |
